Class LoggingBridgeTracer

Namespace
Agibuild.Fulora
Assembly
Agibuild.Fulora.Runtime.dll

Default tracer that logs all bridge calls via ILogger. Attach to Agibuild.Fulora.RuntimeBridgeService for structured call tracing.

public sealed class LoggingBridgeTracer : IBridgeTracer
Inheritance
object
